app.title: QMS Quality Management System
app.description: Integrated Quality Management Platform for Automotive Parts Manufacturers

landing.badge: A New Standard in Automotive Quality
landing.heroDesc: Manage quality across every process in real time — from incoming inspection to shipment — with an integrated QMS built on IATF 16949.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything for Quality, in One Platform
landing.featuresDesc: Purpose-built quality management modules for automotive parts manufacturing
landing.featureIqcDesc: Auto-judge incoming materials and track lots by inspection criteria to prevent defective parts from entering your line.
landing.featureNcrDesc: Record nonconformances instantly and systematically track root cause analysis through corrective action.
landing.featureCapaDesc: Integrate corrective actions based on root cause analysis with preventive measures to stop recurrence.
landing.featureApqpDesc: Systematically plan and execute 5-phase quality plans from new product development through mass production.
landing.featurePpapDesc: Auto-generate PPAP submission documents matched to customer requirements and manage approval history.
landing.featureCertDesc: Automatically generate shipment certificates from inspection data and manage customer-specific formats.
landing.bottomTitle: Start Your Digital Quality Transformation Today
landing.bottomDesc: No complex installation needed. Start right from your browser.
